prompt: A highly detailed anime-style smartphone lock screen wallpaper in a vertical 9:16 composition, themed entirely in sparkling pink idol aesthetics. The scene features Akari, a cheerful teenage magical-idol girl with very long voluminous pastel pink twin-tail hair, bright green eyes, fair skin, and a playful expressive face. She wears an ornate frilly stage costume in layered pink, lavender, and white with gold trim, ribbons, heart motifs, lace cuffs, a choker bow, star earrings, and floral heart hair accessories. The background is a dreamy glitter-filled pink haze with bokeh, sparkles, and soft glow effects. Design it as a fake phone lock screen with a large white lock icon near the top center, cellular status icons in the upper right, and the date in Japanese reading 5月22日 木曜日 above a large glowing time display reading 22:22. Include 5 visible character depictions of the same girl: 1 large central half-body figure winking and holding one finger to her lips in a teasing pose, 1 upper-left bust portrait laughing with eyes closed, 1 upper-right full or three-quarter body pose joyfully raising a small wand or key-like object, 1 lower-left smaller figure partly obscured by a blurred pink rectangle over the face while reaching outward, and 1 lower-right crouching figure with another blurred pink rectangle over the face while interacting with a large physical lock. Add handwritten Japanese sound-effect style text around the figures, including playful exclamations and notes. Show 2 message notification banners styled like iPhone alerts, both from メッセージ and お兄ちゃん with the text 今どこ〜？, one tilted on the left and one upright on the right. Across the lower middle, place a rounded translucent slider bar with Japanese text スライドでロック解除 and a lock icon. Make the unlocking concept literal by attaching an oversized brass padlock and latch mechanism to the slider, with the lower-right character appearing to unlock it using a key; add nearby handwritten Japanese text suggesting lock removal and a metallic click sound. In the lower left, include 2 circular utility icons, a flashlight and a trash can, plus a comic-style speech bubble reading ポイッ！. Add a camera icon in a dark circular button at the lower right and a thin white home indicator at the very bottom. Render everything with polished glossy anime illustration quality, soft lighting, dense sparkles, layered transparency, and a cute mischievous mood, as if an idol character has taken over and physically prevented the phone from being unlocked.
